title: Gemini AI Chatbot Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for using Gemini AI Chatbot effectively.

commands.description: Provides a concise summary of the given text.
commands.scenario: When you have a long article and need a quick overview.

commands.description: Simplifies complex text for easier understanding.
commands.scenario: When the text is too technical or complex.

commands.command: Generate ideas for a blog post about AI
commands.description: Provides creative ideas for writing a blog post.
commands.scenario: When you're brainstorming topics for your blog.

commands.description: Translates the given text into Spanish.
commands.scenario: When you need to communicate with Spanish speakers.

commands.command: Create a list of pros and cons for working remotely
commands.description: Generates a list of advantages and disadvantages.

commands.command: Explain quantum computing in simple terms
commands.description: Breaks down complex topics into simple explanations.
commands.scenario: When you encounter a difficult concept.

commands.description: Condenses information into three key points.
commands.scenario: When you need a quick summary for a meeting.

commands.command: Draft a professional email for a job application
commands.description: Helps create a formal email template for job applications.
commands.scenario: When applying for a new job.

commands.command: Find recent studies on climate change
commands.description: Provides links or summaries of recent research articles.

commands.command: Convert this list into a table format
commands.description: Transforms a list into a structured table.

commands.command: Provide a daily schedule for productivity
commands.description: Creates a structured daily plan to enhance productivity.

commands.command: Generate a creative story about a space adventure
commands.description: Creates an imaginative story based on a given theme.
commands.scenario: When writing fiction or for creative projects.

commands.description: Reviews text for grammatical and spelling errors.
commands.scenario: When finalizing a document or email.

commands.command: List key features of the latest iPhone
commands.description: Provides a list of notable features for a product.

commands.command: Act as a [Role] and critique my [Work/Idea]
commands.description: Assign Gemini a specific persona (e.g., 'Act as a harsh editor' or 'Act as a marketing expert') to get specialized feedback on your writing or concepts.
Transform complex processes into easy-to-follow instructions, perfect for learning new software or hobbies.

commands.command: Extract all dates and action items from this text
commands.description: Quickly pull out specific data points like deadlines, meeting times, or 'to-do' tasks from long emails or documents.

commands.command: Give me 5 different variations of this [Sentence/Headline]
commands.description: Avoid writer's block by asking for multiple stylistic options (e.g., funny, formal, urgent, or short) for a single piece of text.

commands.command: Compare [Option A] and [Option B] in a side-by-side table
commands.description: Use this to make decisions, such as comparing two different vacuum cleaners, travel destinations, or software tools.
